title: mirabilis jalapa var. lindheimeri
intro: Mirabilis jalapa var. lindheimeri, also known as Lindheimer's four o'clock, is a variety of the Mirabilis jalapa plant, a flowering perennial native to the Americas. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and urinary tract infections. The health benefits of Mirabilis jalapa var. lindheimeri include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting digestion, among others. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
